title: 10 best herbal tinctures for cystitis
description: Valerian tinctures helps with cystitis because it has natural anti-inflammatory properties that soothe the urinary tract, reducing pain and discomfort associated with bladder infections. The herb's antispasmodic effects also help to relax the muscles in the bladder, allowing for easier urination and reduced frequency of trips to the bathroom.
